assertions.expectation: Explains that surge upgrades create NEW nodes before draining old ones — this requires extra GPU capacity that may not exist for scarce hardware like H100
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains the surge capacity problem and mentions 'draining existing nodes before creating replacements' vs surge approach, though could be more explicit about surge creating new nodes first

assertions.expectation: Recommends switching to maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 — this drains a node first then creates the replacement, requiring zero extra GPU capacity
assertions.reason: Explicitly provides the exact gcloud command with --max-surge-upgrade 0 and --max-unavailable-upgrade 1, with clear explanation that it requires zero extra GPUs

assertions.expectation: Warns that maxUnavailable=1 means reduced cluster capacity during upgrade — 63/64 nodes available at any time
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Temporary capacity reduction (63 nodes during upgrade instead of 64+surge)' in the tradeoffs section

assertions.expectation: Mentions blue-green as an alternative if a full replacement pool can be provisioned (requires 2x quota but gives instant rollback)
assertions.reason: Mentions controlled blue-green with staging pool but doesn't discuss full replacement pool requiring 2x quota or instant rollback benefits

assertions.expectation: Suggests upgrading during off-peak when some GPU nodes are idle — scale down non-critical workloads to free capacity
assertions.reason: Recommends planning upgrades around training gaps, coordinating with ML teams on natural break points, and scaling down workloads to migrate in batches

assertions.expectation: Notes that with maxUnavailable=1 on 64 nodes at ~20-node parallelism, the upgrade will take significantly longer
assertions.reason: States 'Slower upgrade (sequential rather than parallel)' and mentions '~64 upgrade cycles' though doesn't specifically mention 20-node parallelism

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if GPU reservations have headroom that could be used for surge nodes
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking GPU reservations or headroom for surge nodes

assertions.expectation: Advises scheduling the upgrade during a gap between training runs when nodes can be drained without impacting workloads
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends planning upgrades around training gaps, coordinating with ML teams, and enabling checkpointing for training resumption
